case_title: DAVID CRAIG VS. VICTOR M. FLORES ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUL-15-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, VICTOR M. DBA STONE PROTECTION SERVICES
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF CRAIG, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT BRADFORD, ELVIS DBA NEW CENTURY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CRAIG, DAVID AS TO DEFENDANT FLORES, VICTOR M. DBA STONE PROTECTION SERVICES BRADFORD, ELVIS DBA NEW CENTURY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-09-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-09-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT ELVIS BRADFORD WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CRAIG, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FLORES, VICTOR M. DBA STONE PROTECTION SERVICES PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST ELVIS BRADFORD DBA NEW CENTURY IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST--NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO ELVIS BRADFORD BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-09-2015 AT 10:00 AM.
